title: niphobolus americanus
intro: Niphobolus americanus, also known as the American maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Niphobolus americanus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
